name: KitchenAid Pro Line Series 2-Slice Automatic Toaster - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia - KMT2203TPP
description: Introducing the KitchenAid® Pro Line® Series 2-Slice Automatic Toaster in Pebbled Palm, made by KitchenAid in partnership with Hearth & Hand™. Make everyday simply delicious and easily toast your favorite breads, bagels and more with our most advanced 2-Slice Toaster. This automatic toaster features extra-wide slots to toast a variety of shapes and sizes, including homemade or craft breads. For added convenience enjoy the automatic lift & lower feature that senses bread in the slot, auto keep warm, and 7 shade settings for toast just the way you like it, light or dark.
